Linear.summary: Linear shipped a major overhaul of Cycles and Roadmaps, introducing drag-and-drop prioritization, cross-team dependencies, and a new timeline swimlane view. Additionally, they launched GitHub Copilot integration for auto-generating issue descriptions.
raw_entries: GitHub Copilot integration for issue descriptions - 2026-03-20

Notion.latest_entry: Notion AI: Chart generation from tables
Notion.summary: Notion added AI-powered chart generation directly from database tables, allowing users to create bar, line, and pie charts with a single prompt. They also launched shared AI blocks that update for all viewers simultaneously.
raw_entries: Notion AI: Chart generation from tables - 2026-03-30
